description_long: This is a rectangular stone obelisk with a broad, flat top and a slightly flared base, giving it a sturdy and monumental appearance. The surface is weathered and textured, with a grayish coloration that suggests it is made of concrete or stone. On the front face, there is a raised plaque or relief featuring an open book motif, possibly representing an inscription or commemorative element. The sides and back are plain, lacking any additional ornamentation or features. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for placement in parks, plazas, or near public buildings. The obelisk stands as a solitary structure, with no visible attachments or surrounding features.
description: A rectangular, gray stone obelisk with a broad top and a relief of an open book on its front face. The surface is weathered and plain, with a sturdy, monumental design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book relief plaque centered on the face, with the broad top and flared base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain, unadorned surface and the thickness of the obelisk, with the relief plaque slightly protruding from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely plain, textured surface with no ornamentation or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and the edge of the relief plaque on the front.
attribute_inscription: There is a raised plaque on the front face depicting an open book with some indiscernible markings or text. The style is simple and the language is not legible from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: The only ornamentation is the open book relief plaque on the front face; no other decorative elements are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular and slightly flared, providing stability. It is plain with no decorative features, matching the material and texture of the rest of the obelisk.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and broad, forming a square platform with no unique features or decorations.
